title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIIT Hyderabad

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIIT Hyderabad
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIIT Hyderabad. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About IIIT Hyderabad:
IIIT Hyderabad is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIIT Hyderabad!
